overall.description: A first-person exploration of an abandoned Soviet-era institutional building, likely a school or hospital, in a foggy overcast setting. The player walks through the derelict interior featuring a grand entrance hall, classrooms with broken furniture, and a dormitory with metal beds, before exiting through a collapsed wall to the overgrown exterior grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned institutional building entrance with stone portico

events.description: approaching and entering the abandoned building through the main portico

agents.ego_description: walking toward the abandoned building and passing through the stone portico into the entrance

entered.detail: large weathered concrete columns supporting a triangular pediment
old bicycle leaning against the left column
open double wooden doors leading into the dark interior

segments.scene_description: The scene opens outside an abandoned Soviet-era building with imposing stone columns. The camera approaches the entrance portico where a bicycle rests against a pillar, then moves through the open double doors into the darkness within.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict entrance hall with notice boards and lockers

events.description: moving deeper into the building where natural light diminishes significantly

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark entrance hall past bulletin boards and locker cabinets

entered.detail: large red bulletin board with papers mounted on the yellow wall
row of red and gray cubby lockers along the left wall
open double doors leading to inner rooms

segments.scene_description: Inside the abandoned building, the camera moves through a dimly lit entrance hall. A red notice board and old lockers line the left wall as the camera progresses toward the inner doors, leaving the entrance portico behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned classroom with desks and large windows

events.description: entering the classroom from the hallway
turning to look out the windows at the foggy landscape

agents.ego_description: exploring the abandoned classroom, examining scattered desks and looking out at the foggy trees through the windows

entered.detail: wooden desks and chairs scattered across the debris-covered floor
green chalkboard on the far wall
large windows with radiators below showing foggy exterior with dead trees

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a classroom filled with scattered desks and chairs. Moving along the wall of windows, it reveals a green blackboard at the front while foggy daylight filters through, illuminating the dusty interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor leading to dormitory with metal beds

events.description: entering the dormitory room with rows of metal beds
discovering a teddy bear left on one of the beds

agents.ego_description: moving through dark corridors and entering a dormitory room, approaching a teddy bear left on a metal bed

entered.detail: rows of metal frame beds with thin mattresses arranged in the room
small teddy bear with red clothing sitting on a bed
windows overlooking foggy landscape with bare trees

segments.scene_description: Navigating through dark hallways, the camera enters a dormitory filled with rows of empty metal beds. Natural light streams through large windows as the camera approaches a teddy bear abandoned on one of the beds, creating a poignant moment in the derelict space.

scene_state.functional_zone: collapsed wall section leading to exterior grounds

events.description: exiting the building through the broken wall to the outside
emerging from darkness into overcast daylight

agents.ego_description: navigating through debris toward the collapsed wall and stepping outside into the foggy grounds

entered.detail: large hole in the brick wall with rubble scattered on the floor
metal fence enclosing the property visible through the hole
tall grass and weeds covering the ground outside

segments.scene_description: Moving through the abandoned building, the camera approaches a collapsed section of wall. It steps through the broken masonry and rubble, transitioning from the dark interior to the foggy overgrown exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy overgrown field outside abandoned building

agents.ego_description: walking along the exterior of the building beside the chain-link fence in the fog

entered.detail: brick wall of the building with broken windows
utility poles and wires against the gray sky

segments.scene_description: Outside in the foggy grounds, the camera moves along the building's exterior wall beside a chain-link fence. Power lines stretch across the gray sky above the overgrown vegetation surrounding the abandoned structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the imposing exterior of a Soviet-era building, through its decaying interior, and back out into a desolate, overgrown landscape. It begins by approaching a stone portico where a bicycle leans against a pillar before gliding through open double doors into a dimly lit entrance hall lined with lockers and a red notice board. As the camera pushes deeper into the structure, the scene shifts from the dark hallway into a dusty classroom filled with scattered desks and a green blackboard, then transitions through further corridors into a dormitory where light streams over rows of empty metal beds and a lone teddy bear. The movement then leads toward a collapsed section of masonry, stepping through the rubble to leave the interior behind. Finally, the camera emerges into the foggy exterior, moving along a chain-link fence and weathered walls under a gray sky crisscrossed by power lines.
